Hello, I'm

Basil Rari

AI/ML Engineer • Robotics & Drones • Edge AI

Building intelligent systems that bridge software and hardware. Specializing in autonomous drones, computer vision, and multi-agent systems.

View ProjectsGet in Touch

About Me

I'm a graduate student at National Chung Cheng University, Taiwan, deeply interested in AI agents and multi-agent systems, focusing on secure, trustworthy AI for real-world decision-making.

My work spans from developing multi-drone armies for flood search and rescue with NVIDIA Jetson-based Edge AI, to building LLM-powered command interfaces for autonomous drone coordination.

Technical Skills

Languages

Python, Go, Rust, JavaScript/TypeScript, Solidity

AI/ML

LLMs, VLMs, CNNs, Transformers, OpenCV, PyTorch

Systems

NVIDIA Jetson, Docker, AWS, Linux, Smart Contracts

Featured Projects

Multi-Drone Army for Flood Search & Rescue

Developing a multi-drone system with NVIDIA Jetson-based on-board Edge AI for autonomous flood search and rescue operations. Built an LLM-powered text-driven command interface for drone coordination.

RustPythonOpenCVNVIDIA JetsonLLM
View on GitHub

Public Littering Detection System

Building a modular system using vision-language models (VLMs) to analyze city surveillance video. Generates structured violation reports with tamper-resistant logging.

PythonOpenCVVLM (GLM)Computer Vision
View on GitHub

Troo Bridge – Climate Action Payment Layer

Developing a payment-layer platform enabling merchants to offer carbon footprint offsetting at checkout. Routes contributions into verified national registry carbon credits.

GoPostgreSQLNext.jsBlockchain
View on GitHub

CNN + Transformer Littering Behavior Detection

Developed an AI model combining CNN and transformer architectures for public littering behavior detection. Achieved 84% accuracy through robust computer vision pipelines.

PythonPyTorchYOLODensePoseTransformers
View on GitHub

TEDxSaintgits – Official Event Platform

Developed the official TEDxSaintgits event website with QR-based ticketing, speaker profiles, and live check-in.

DeCarb – Carbon Credit Marketplace
